title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Delhivery Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Delhivery Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Logistics Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Delhivery Digital Technologies:
Delhivery Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Digital Technologies!
